title: Cherec #2776
definition:
Heres = "the sun"

 1) a mountain inhabited by Amorites in Moab; the place where Gideon
    turned back from chasing the Midianites
nasbUsage:
Definition: Heres = "the sun"

 1) a mountain inhabited by Amorites in Moab; the place where Gideon
    turned back from chasing the Midianites

    NASB:  a mountain E. of the Jordan, also dwelling place of the Amorites
